PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $emu = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\emulator\\emulator.exe"; "adb exists: $\(Test-Path $adb\)"; "emulator exists: $\(Test-Path $emu\)"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { & $adb devices }; if \(Test-Path $emu\) { "--- AVDs:"; & $emu -list-avds }; "--- Chrome:"; @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { $_ } })
